title: Skyblock Beyond
description: An extensive tech-based datapack, including new tools, machines, and an entire progression path.
body:
Skyblock Beyond
by Resistance_Is_Futile

This datapack contains a plentiful amount of machines, workstations and many mor features!
It's inspired by the well known Skyblock Modpacks, so you too start with almost nothing.

Work your way through the tech-tree, craft more and more powerful machines and automate the grind!

Some of the Features are:                                                      
-Sieves and Meshes                                                       
-Wood and Stone Barrels                                                       
-Hammers                                                      
-Block Placers, Miners and Breakers                                                      
-More Furnaces                                                      
-More Materials (Ores, Alloys, etc.)                                                      
-Custom Tool Crafting-Custom Enchantments                                                      
-A Power System-Farming Machines                                                      
-A Storage System...and much more.

Even though this datapack was made with a Skyblock setting in mind, you can play it in a normal world too!

-The .zip file contains just the datapack. Drop it into your /datapacks folder of the world and type /reload
To get the full experience also include these datapacks:

https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/skyblock-beyond-void-world/ (Void World)
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/technical-enchant-for-1-17/) (TE+)            
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/skyblock-beyond-te-addon/ (TE+ Addon)

If you find any bugs, write a comment or a message on my discord server: https://discord.gg/NQSZCVqKvH


All people whose content is included have either agreed to my inquiry or allowed the usage natively:

Datapack utils by ImCoolYeah5000:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/datapack-utils/
Datapack Custom Durability by shade:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwtuNDTpmZA
Datapack Builderswand by mcskware:
https://github.com/mcskware/builderswand
Datapack Safari Net by RagPoet:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/passive-safari-nets/
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/hostile-safari-nets/
Datapack Box Packer by KamiADN:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/box-packer/
Double Slab Textures by The_Khuzdûl1:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/khuz-s-public-pack/
More Double Slab Textures by Valdr687:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/valdr687-s-double-slabs/
